---
name: bug-fixer
version: 1.0.0
description: |
  Finds and fixes bugs in your code. Tests and verifies each fix. Runs your test
  suite before and after each change. Use when asked to "fix this bug", "something
  is broken", or "make the tests pass".
  Proactively suggest when tests are failing or when the user reports a bug.
allowed-tools:
  - Bash
  - Read
  - Write
  - Edit
---

# bug-fixer

Bug detection and automated fixing.
